bugs_found.description: run_all.sh runs msprof but never calls parse_profiler.py — parsed files are stale/manual
No parsed JSON files exist (Event profiler, no msprof)
B=32 not present in correctness results
PyPTO benchmark uses torch.randn() instead of loading data files

cross_operator_patterns: Flat-batch pattern (10/12) — correct for element-wise ops
Near-identical tiling struct across all element-wise ops
Matmul per-kernel time ~3.55us regardless of batch — scaling from kernel count
Transpose scales near-linearly (60.6x for 64x data) due to scalar transpose
Data integrity clean — all ops generate per-batch unique inputs
